headline: Semicap stocks: Morgan Stanley raises WFE outlook and shifts ratings
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley raised its outlook for the semiconductor capital equipment cycle, lifting wafer fab equipment (WFE) forecasts and reshuffling ratings across key industry names as it flagged stronger NAND momentum and a longer cycle than previously expected.

headline: Stocks Set to Open Lower as Oil Rises Amid Iran Impasse, Nvidia Earnings and Fed Minutes Awaited

headline: One Lane Closed. The Whole Rate Picture Changed
summary: One shipping lane controls roughly 20 percent of the world's oil supply. Right now, it's closed. And in the space of five trading days, that single fact has moved oil to $105 a barrel, pushed Treasury yields to their highest point in roughly a year, and resurrected a rate hike scenario that nobody was pricing a week ago. Welcome to Monday.

Welcome to Monday.
